com.semanticwww.yesir.gateway
Class GatewayManager

java.lang.Object
  com.semanticwww.yesir.gateway.GatewayManager
public class GatewayManager
extends java.lang.Object

Manages gateways for a forum, which synchronize the forum with external data sources such as an NNTP newsgroup or email account. Notes: The default GatewayManager implementation stores configuration properties in a file called gateway_config.xml under the Home directory. The default implementation also only knows how to instantiate Gateway implementations that have either a default constructor or one that accepts a ForumFactory and Forum as arguments.

See Also:
Gateway

          A task that exports a message through all installed gateways.

          A task that performs an import for all installed gateways.

Field Detail

DEFAULT_GATEWAY_CLASSES

public static final java.lang.String[] DEFAULT_GATEWAY_CLASSES
The list of the class names of the gateways that are available for installation by default. These values are automatically added into the gateways.xml file when it is first created. Further classes can be defined by editing the Gateways.gatewayClasses property.

properties

private static XMLProperties properties

gateways

private Gateway[] gateways

context

private java.lang.String context
Context for this manager instance in the XML property file.

The scheduled task for gateway imports.

private boolean exportEnabled

exportFooter

private java.lang.String exportFooter

importInterval

private int importInterval
Constructor Detail

GatewayManager

public GatewayManager()

GatewayManager

public GatewayManager(java.lang.String nothing)
Creates a new GatewayManager. It will load existing values from the persistent store.

Method Detail

isImportEnabled

public boolean isImportEnabled()
Returns true if gateway importing is turned on. When importing is on, the importData method of each installed gateway will be invoked at the specified import interval. By default, importing is enabled.

Returns:
true if gateway imports are enabled.

setImportEnabled

public void setImportEnabled(boolean importEnabled)
Toggles gateway importing on or off. When importing is on, the importData method of each installed gateway will be invoked at the specified import interval. By default, importing is enabled.

Parameters:
importEnabled - true if gateway importing should be enabled.

isExportEnabled

public boolean isExportEnabled()
Returns true if gateway exporting is turned on. When exporting is on, the exportData method of each installed gateway will be invoked on each new message that is created in the forum. By default, exporting is enabled.

Returns:
true if gateway exports are enabled.

setExportEnabled

public void setExportEnabled(boolean exportEnabled)
Toggles gateway exporting on or off. When exporting is on, the exportData method of each installed gateway will be invoked on each new message that is created in the forum. By default, exporting is enabled.

Parameters:
exportEnabled - true if gateway exporting should be enabled.

getExportFooter

public java.lang.String getExportFooter()
Returns the footer that will be appended to messages as they're exported. By default, this value is null, which means that no footer will be used.

A number of tokens can be inserted into the filter. Each token will be dynamically replaced as the message is sent out with the real value. Valid tokens are:

    {threadID}, {threadName}, {forumID}, {forumName}, {messageID}

Returns:
the footer that will be appended to messages being exported.

setExportFooter

public void setExportFooter(java.lang.String exportFooter)
Sets the footer that will be appended to messages as they're exported. By default, this value is null, which means that no footer will be used.

A number of tokens can be inserted into the filter. Each token will be dynamically replaced as the message is sent out with the real value. Valid tokens are:

    {threadID}, {threadName}, {forumID}, {forumName}, {messageID}

Parameters:
exportFooter - the footer that will be appended to messages being exported.

getImportInterval

public int getImportInterval()
Returns the number of minutes that the manager waits between each gateway import. Default is 15 minutes.

Returns:
the number of minutes between automatic index updates.

setImportInterval

public void setImportInterval(int importInterval)
Sets the number of minutes that the manager waits between each gateway import. Default is 15 minutes.

getGateway

public Gateway getGateway(int index)
Returns the Gateway at the specified index.

Returns:
the filter at the specified index.

getGatewayCount

public int getGatewayCount()
Returns the count of currently active gateways for the forum.

Returns:
a count of the currently active filters.

addGateway

public void addGateway(Gateway gateway)
Adds a new Gateway to the end of the gateway list.

Parameters:
gateway - Gateway to add to the gateway list.

addGateway

public void addGateway(Gateway gateway,
                       int index)
Inserts a new Gateway at specified index in the gateway list.

Parameters:
gateway - Gateway to add to the gateway list.
index - position in gateway list to insert new gateway.

removeGateway

public void removeGateway(int index)
Removes a Gateway at the specified index in the gateway list.

Parameters:
index - position in gateway list to remove gateway from.

removeGateway

public void removeGateway(Gateway gate)
removeGateway

Parameters:
gate - Gateway

saveGateways

public void saveGateways()
Saves all Gateways to the persistent store. This method should be called after setting any properties on individual gateways that are being managed by this gateway manager.

saveGateways

public void saveGateways(boolean restartImports)
Saves all Gateways to the persistent store. This method should be called after setting any properties on individual gateways that are being managed by this gateway manager.

exportData

public void exportData(Meme[] message)
Exports an individual message through all gateways. This method is only intended to be called by other internal Jive classes.

delete

public void delete()
Deletes all gateways for this context by removing their properties and stopping them from running.

startImportTask

private void startImportTask()
Start/restart the gateway import task

loadProperties

private static void loadProperties()
Loads a property manager for gateway persistence if it isn't already loaded. If an XML file for the gateways isn't already created, it will attempt to make a file with default value.

getGateways

public Gateway[] getGateways()
